text:
is the first story arc of the Attack on Titan manga.

Introduction

The story commences within the Walls of humanity, where our main protagonists, Eren Yeager, Mikasa Ackerman and Armin Arlert are introduced. However, an enigmatic menace called the Titans poses a consistent threat from beyond the Walls. The children swiftly become acquainted with the horrors of the Titans when the colossal Colossus Titan breaches the gate of their hometown, Shiganshina District.
